prd_compliance.details: All 6 phases fully implemented. 8 pages, 6 components, 7 services, 1 hook, 1 store, 3 helper modules. Every requirement in the PRD has a corresponding implementation.

type_safety.details: All types from @escalaflow/shared used correctly across 16 files. Zero 'any' types found. All services typed with shared interfaces (Setor, Colaborador, Escala, etc.). ApiError extends Error with proper status property.

v0_conversions.details: All V0 conversions verified: AUSENCIA->INDISPONIVEL (0 AUSENCIA references), href->to (0 href= in .tsx), usePathname->useLocation (0 usePathname references), 'use client' only in shadcn-generated files (not custom code), tipo->severidade for Violacao, nota->observacao for Excecao, icon-sm->icon+h-7 w-7.

service_layer.details: Zero raw fetch() in any page component. All fetch goes through centralized api.ts. 7 entity services (setores, colaboradores, excecoes, escalas, tipos-contrato, empresa, dashboard) all use api.get/post/put/del.

shadcn_usage.details: All 17 required shadcn components installed and used: Button, Card, Badge, Input, Label, Select, Dialog, Tabs, Tooltip, Table (via EscalaGrid structure), Breadcrumb, Separator, Sidebar, AlertDialog, Collapsible (Card click-to-expand for violacoes), Sonner, ScrollArea. Components used with proper props (variant, size, asChild).

error_handling.details: Every API mutation (create, update, delete, generate, officialize, discard) has try/catch with toast.error. Error messages come from ApiError.message (backend Portuguese messages). All pages verified: SetorLista (create, restore), SetorDetalhe (save, create/delete demanda, reorder rank, archive), ColaboradorLista (create, restore), ColaboradorDetalhe (save, create/delete excecao, archive), EscalaPagina (gerar, oficializar, descartar, load tabs), EmpresaConfig (save).

loading_empty_states.details: All 8 pages have loading states ('Carregando...' text with PageHeader). All list pages have empty states with icon (size-10 text-muted-foreground/40) + descriptive text + subtext. Dashboard handles empty setores/alertas. SetorDetalhe and ColaboradorDetalhe handle 404 (entity not found).

navigation.details: All cross-page links verified: Dashboard setor cards -> /setores/:id, SetorDetalhe 'Ver perfil' -> /colaboradores/:id, SetorDetalhe 'Abrir Escala' -> /setores/:id/escala, ColaboradorDetalhe breadcrumb -> /colaboradores, ColaboradorLista 'Ver Perfil' -> /colaboradores/:id, EscalaPagina breadcrumbs -> /setores + /setores/:id. Sidebar active states use pathname.startsWith() for nested routes. Catch-all route -> NaoEncontrado page.

naming.details: Portuguese naming convention followed: componentes/, paginas/, servicos/, estado/, hooks/. snake_case throughout DB=JSON=TS fields (setor_id, tipo_contrato_id, hora_abertura, etc.). Named exports (not default) on all modules.

performance.details: EscalaGrid uses Map<string, Alocacao> keyed by '${colaboradorId}-${data}' for O(1) lookup per cell. Zero .find() calls in EscalaGrid. useMemo on alocacaoMap, contratoMap, allDates, weeks. EscalaPagina.computeIndicators also uses Map-based lookup.

no_regressions.details: Phase 6 polish did not break anything. TypeCheck and Build both pass. All pages maintain consistent patterns: PageHeader at top, space-y-6 for cards, consistent button sizes.

build_status.details: npx tsc --noEmit: 0 errors. npx vite build: 0 errors, 1856 modules transformed, built in 14.22s. Bundle: 558.90 kB JS (168.44 kB gzip), 44.73 kB CSS (8.11 kB gzip).

suggestions.description: Sidebar 'Escala' and 'Setores' items both point to /setores. Both will be highlighted simultaneously when navigating to /setores/* routes. Consider differentiating the Escala link (e.g., removing it from sidebar since escala is accessed per-setor via SetorDetalhe) or adding a visual distinction.

Bundle size is 558KB (168KB gzip), triggering Vite's chunk size warning. Consider code-splitting with dynamic imports (React.lazy) for heavier pages like EscalaPagina and SetorDetalhe to reduce initial load. Not blocking for local app.
EscalaGrid cells use raw <button> element instead of shadcn Button. This is acceptable since cells need highly custom styling, but could use a minimal wrapper for accessibility consistency.
Historico de Escalas card shows placeholder text. The PRD notes this as deferred per plan, which is acceptable. Consider implementing in a future sprint.
Default date values are hardcoded to '2026-03-01' and '2026-03-31'. Consider computing sensible defaults dynamically (e.g., current month or next month).

security_review.input_validation: present (form validation on required fields before API calls)
security_review.xss_protection: React JSX escaping handles output. No dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage.
